Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Feb-28-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances by any party or counsel.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff Align Technology, Inc.'s Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order is off calendar per the request of the moving party. Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. (302/JPT/HK)
